issues.title: UTF-8 issue on ChatClientTitan
issues.body:
Hi, it seems that response of chatClientTitan is not in UTF-8:

![image](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/assets/60919789/46ed77a1-c6b5-4902-b16d-d53defe4f5ee)

comments.body:
Same issue, I also tried with chunk.bytes().asUtf8String()
The issue is only with "stream" method, with "call" it works.
I'll try to do some test to understand if it's an issue on awssdk side.
You can try with something like this: "Chi è Bill Gates?".
This model is no longer supported, api access has been changed to go through the converse APIs.

issues.title: Add an additional builder method that takes existing options.
issues.body: Passing into an options builder an existing set of options to start from seems like a good pattern.  If so, ensure it is followed across all builder apis.

comments.body: No one seems to have minded not having a copy like ctor, so closing

issues.title: Review if Option classes from builders should be immutable
issues.body: right now they aren't.  For example, `options.getFunctions().add()` will let you modify the created `FunctionCallingOptions` from the builder.  This should be considered across all builder implementations.

comments.body: There has been a great deal of refactoring since this the issue was reported, I don't think this issue is relevant anymore.
